Description: Active Directory Certificate Services ESC vulnerability assessment rules

Rules.Description: Detects certificate templates with CT_FLAG_ENROLLEE_SUPPLIES_SUBJECT flag and Client Auth EKU (Certified Pre-Owned ESC1).

Rules.CheckName: ESC2 - Any Purpose or No EKU Templates
Rules.Description: Detects certificate templates with Any Purpose EKU or no EKU restriction without manager approval (ESC2).
Detects templates with Certificate Request Agent EKU enabling enrollment on behalf of other users (ESC3).
Detects CAs with EDITF_ATTRIBUTESUBJECTALTNAME2 flag enabling attacker-controlled SANs on any template (ESC6).

Rules.CheckName: ESC8 - HTTP Certificate Web Enrollment Endpoint
Rules.Description: Detects CA web enrollment endpoints accessible over HTTP, enabling NTLM relay certificate attacks (ESC8).
